name: Scandinavian
description: Emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and natural materials. Light woods, neutral tones, and cozy textures create a serene, inviting atmosphere.

name: Minimalist
description: Focuses on essential elements, clean surfaces, and a monochromatic palette. Every piece serves a purpose with no visual clutter.

name: Industrial
description: Celebrates raw, unfinished aesthetics with exposed materials. Metal, wood, and brick combine for a bold, urban feel.

name: Japandi
description: A harmonious blend of Japanese minimalism and Scandinavian coziness. Natural textures, muted palettes, and intentional design.

name: Mid-Century Modern
description: Iconic mid-20th century design with organic curves, tapered legs, and bold accent colors. Timeless and sophisticated.

name: Contemporary
description: Reflects current design trends with a mix of textures, bold accents, and curated statement pieces. Luxurious yet approachable.
